systemAnalysis.systemImpact: This change introduces a read-only verification script. It will query the Mautic API, causing a minor increase in API load during execution. It does not modify any system data, so the risk to the running system is low.

executionSteps.description: Update pyproject.toml to add 'requests' as a dependency.
Create the main Python verification script.

files.change: Create a new Python script to perform verification checks against the Mautic API.

executionSteps.description: Create the bash script to run the verification.

files.change: Create the verification script that executes the Python script and checks its exit code.
